home.title: BarberLaki
home.description: Your hair, our passion. Book your appointment now and experience the best haircut of your life.

booking.title: Book Your Appointment
booking.description: Enter your details to schedule your next premium grooming session.
booking.success: Success! Your appointment is confirmed for {{date}} at {{time}}.
booking.validationFailed: Validation failed. Please check your input.
booking.timeSlotBooked: This time slot is already booked. Please choose another time.
booking.dayUnavailable: This day is unavailable for booking. Please choose another date.
booking.errorOccurred: An error occurred: {{message}} Please try again.
booking.serverConfigError: Server configuration error. Could not send emails.
booking.criticalError: A critical server error occurred and we could not fully save your booking. Please contact us directly.

admin.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment?

schedule.title: Manage Schedule
schedule.bookingWindow: Booking Window (How far ahead can customers book?)

appointments.title: Current Appointments
appointments.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment?

cancellation.title: Manage Your Bookings
cancellation.description: Enter your details to view and cancel your upcoming appointments.
cancellation.noBookings: No upcoming appointments found for these details.
cancellation.confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment?

landing.heroDesc: Book your appointment now and experience the best haircut of your life.

haircut.title: Haircut
haircut.desc: Precision cutting tailored to your face shape and personal style. Includes wash and styling.

beard.title: Beard Trim
beard.desc: Expert beard shaping and grooming with premium oils for a refined finish.

shave.title: Hot Towel Shave
shave.desc: A luxurious traditional straight-razor shave with hot towel treatment.

landing.aboutDesc1: With over 15 years of experience in the art of barbering, our master barber brings unparalleled expertise to every cut. Trained in both classic and contemporary techniques.
landing.aboutDesc2: At BarberLaki, we believe that a great haircut is more than just a service — it's an experience.

footer.desc: Your hair, our passion. Premium grooming for the modern gentleman.
